summary: Completed comprehensive testing of QR Code Editor customization system. All features are working correctly - backend APIs, frontend UI, modal functionality, tabs, real-time preview updates, color palettes, and save/print functionality.
passed_tests: ✅ 'Personalizar QR Codes' button appears and is clickable
✅ QR Code Editor modal opens correctly
✅ All 4 tabs present and functional (Conteúdo, Estilo, Layout, Logo)
✅ Preview area displays correctly with real-time updates
✅ Content editing updates preview immediately (title field tested)
✅ Color palette application works (style tab tested)
✅ Save button ('Guardar Configurações') present and clickable
✅ Print button ('Imprimir') present with batch selection
✅ QR settings update and retrieval verification works
✅ Table QR code image generation works
✅ Table QR code data endpoint works
